cases.title: Scenario matrix row for manual correction governance within policy window
preconditions: Testing-plan §3 Manual correction governance block applies (FR-20, FR-21, BR-14/15/16, AC-13, AC-14).
Assigned Lecturer exists for class section; effective policy manualEditWindow is active from session close.
Closed session has enrolled student with AttendanceRecord status Absent and no prior manual correction.
steps: Authenticate as assigned Lecturer for the session class section.
Submit PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and documented reason.
Query AttendanceRecord and AuditLog for the student-session pair.
Verify correction occurs only while within manual edit window per BR-14.
cases.expected: Manual correction within policy window is accepted per AC-13 coverage row; AttendanceRecord updates to requested status with checkInMethod Manual; AuditLog contains actor, timestamp, old status, new status, and reason per BR-22.

cases.title: Manual correction command persists attendance update and audit row in one transaction
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for attendance ledger and audit modules.
Closed session exists with enrolled student AttendanceRecord status Absent assigned at close (AC-12).
Assigned Lecturer is within manualEditWindow per effective policy resolved for the class section.
Policy mandates reason for manual corrections (VR-MC-04).
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status Absent, checkInMethod null or system-assigned, no prior manual audit for this mutation.
Invoke PATCH attendance correction through application service with status Manual Present, reason, and Idempotency-Key within DB transaction boundary.
Query attendance_records and audit_logs tables for target studentUserId and classSessionId.
Verify correlation ID links mutation to audit entry.
cases.expected: Single transaction commits AttendanceRecord with afterState Manual Present and checkInMethod Manual; exactly one audit_logs row records actorUserId, role Lecturer, oldStatus Absent, newStatus Manual Present, reason text, and occurredAt timestamp per FR-29 and BR-22.

cases.title: SM-03 AttendanceRecord transitions Absent to Manual Present via lecturer correction within window
preconditions: Closed class session exists in integration test database.
Enrolled student has AttendanceRecord in Absent state from close-time finalization (BR-13).
Assigned Lecturer is within manualEditWindow; session SM-01 state is Closed.
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status Absent; session state Closed.
Execute lecturer manual correction command with allowed status Manual Present and required reason.
Capture afterState for AttendanceRecord and emitted AttendanceCorrected event.
Verify no illegal session state transitions are attempted.
cases.expected: beforeState Absent transitions to afterState Manual Present when lecturer is in scope and within edit window; session remains Closed; transition is auditable and does not reopen session per SM-01 rules.

cases.title: Idempotent PATCH attendance returns prior applied mutation without duplicate audit rows
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; assigned Lecturer is within edit window.
Idempotency-Key header support is enabled for PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId}.
Real database with audit_logs immutability constraints.
steps: Issue PATCH correction with status Manual Present, reason, and Idempotency-Key K1; record response.
Replay identical PATCH with same Idempotency-Key K1, same body, and same actor.
Query AttendanceRecord and audit_logs count for the student-session pair.
Compare second response to first accepted mutation summary.
cases.expected: First request applies correction and writes one audit row; replay returns already-applied mutation summary without second AttendanceRecord change or duplicate audit_logs entry per API idempotency rules.

cases.title: PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} returns 200 with updated status envelope
preconditions: Assigned Lecturer is authenticated with bearer token.
Closed session exists with student AttendanceRecord status Absent from session close.
Manual edit window is active; policy requires reason for corrections.
steps: Lecturer calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with body {"status": "Manual Present", "reason": "Sinh vien co mat nhung loi camera tren thiet bi."} and Idempotency-Key header.
Inspect HTTP status 200, response envelope data fields, and error is null.
Call GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance and locate the corrected student row.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs filtered by targetId and actionType for manual attendance update.
cases.expected: PATCH returns 200 with standard envelope; roster row shows attendanceStatus Manual Present and checkInMethod Manual; audit query returns entry with oldStatus Absent, newStatus Manual Present, actor, reason, and timestamp.

cases.title: E2E-06 primary workflow lecturer manual correction in allowed window updates status and audit
preconditions: Lecturer opens and closes session for assigned section (AC-01, AC-05).
Session close assigns Absent to enrolled student without successful check-in (AC-12).
Manual edit window from effective policy is not yet expired.
Lecturer bearer token is available.
steps: Lecturer reviews GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance showing student Absent.
Lecturer submits PATCH correction to Manual Present with documented reason after in-person verification.
Lecturer refreshes roster via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
AcademicAdmin or authorized role queries GET /v1/audit-logs for the correction event.
cases.expected: End-to-end E2E-06 / WF-05 happy path completes: student status changes from Absent to Manual Present; roster reflects update immediately; audit record is queryable with full actor/time/old/new/reason fields per AC-13.

cases.title: Flow C audit verification after privileged attendance mutation within edit window
preconditions: Closed session with Pending student upgraded to Absent at close exists.
Assigned Lecturer performs in-window correction changing status to Excused with reason.
Audit query endpoint is available to AcademicAdmin or SystemAuditor read scope.
steps: Record roster status before correction via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
Lecturer applies PATCH correction with status Excused and reason documenting excused absence.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs with filters targetType AttendanceRecord, targetId, and time range covering correction.
Verify audit payload fields against CMP-01 minimum audit fields from roles-permissions doc.
cases.expected: Committed mutation has corresponding audit record with actor, role, target student/session, old status, new status Excused, reason, and timestamp; no mutation audit gap per BR-22 and AC-19 alignment.

cases.title: Alternate branch lecturer corrects GPS-rejected Pending student to Manual Present within window
preconditions: Open session with GPS-required policy exists; student check-in rejected with OutOfRadius (AC-10).
Student remains Pending on roster with failed attempt logged.
Lecturer verifies student in person and manual edit window is active (BR-14).
steps: Confirm GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance shows student Pending with latestAttemptOutcome OutOfRadius.
Lecturer calls PATCH correction with status Manual Present and reason after in-person verification.
Verify roster row and audit trail.
Confirm prior failed CheckInAttempt rows are preserved.
cases.expected: Manual fallback path succeeds within window: status becomes Manual Present without requiring QR re-check-in; failed GPS attempt history remains; audit captures old Pending to new Manual Present with reason per NFR-17 manual fallback operability.

cases.title: PATCH correction without required reason returns ReasonRequired and preserves Absent record
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; assigned Lecturer is within edit window.
Effective policy mandates reason for all manual corrections (VR-MC-04).
Lecturer bearer token is authenticated.
steps: Call PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and empty or omitted reason field.
Inspect HTTP status and error.code in response envelope.
Query AttendanceRecord and audit_logs for the student-session pair.
Retry with valid reason as control to confirm window still active.
cases.expected: Request is rejected with validation error ReasonRequired (400 class); AttendanceRecord remains Absent; no audit_logs mutation entry is written for the failed attempt; control request with reason succeeds.

cases.title: Student, SystemAuditor, ITAdmin, and out-of-scope Lecturer denied PATCH attendance correction
preconditions: Closed session in section A with Absent student; manual edit window is active.
Student, SystemAuditor, and ITAdmin bearer tokens and Lecturer token for unassigned section B are available.
Assigned Lecturer token for section A is available as authorized control.
steps: Student calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and reason.
SystemAuditor calls the same PATCH for the section A session.
ITAdmin calls the same PATCH without explicit academic grant.
Out-of-scope Lecturer (section B) calls the same PATCH for section A session.
Assigned Lecturer calls the same PATCH as control.
Verify AttendanceRecord state after denied attempts.
cases.expected: Student, SystemAuditor, and ITAdmin receive 403 Forbidden per permission matrix; out-of-scope Lecturer receives 403 OutOfScope per PRM-01; no attendance mutation or audit write occurs from denied roles; assigned Lecturer control succeeds and updates status.

cases.title: Lecturer ManualCorrectionDialog on PG-06 submits correction with reason and updates roster badge
preconditions: Lecturer is authenticated on desktop browser (PG-06 live roster view) for assigned section.
Closed session displays student row with Absent danger badge.
Manual edit window is active per effective policy; reason field is required (FRM-08).
steps: Navigate to /lecturer/sessions/{id}/roster and locate Absent student row.
Open ManualCorrectionDialog from row action; select Manual Present in status dropdown.
Enter reason in labeled Lý do textarea and confirm via dialog submit.
Observe AttendanceStatusCell updates to Manual Present success variant and summary chips refresh.
Verify dialog closes and focus returns to trigger per accessibility rules.
cases.expected: Browser FLOW-08 completes: form gating enforces required reason before submit; post-save roster row shows Manual Present badge; no escalation guidance appears because edit window is active; UI state matches API correction and audit write per AC-13.

cases.title: GET /v1/audit-logs pagination returns scoped manual-correction audit entries across page boundaries
preconditions: dispute-trail fixture or seeded data includes at least 30 manual attendance correction audit entries for one lecturer-scoped class section.
AcademicAdmin bearer token is authenticated within institution scope.
Corrections were committed within manual edit window per AC-13 with actor, old status, new status, and reason recorded.
steps: Query GET /v1/audit-logs?targetType=AttendanceRecord&actionType=manual_update&classSectionId={sectionId}&page=1&pageSize=25.
Verify HTTP 200, meta.pagination page=1, pageSize=25, totalItems >= 30, and totalPages >= 2.
Record audit entry IDs from page 1 and verify each row includes actor, oldStatus, newStatus, reason, and occurredAt.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs with same filters and page=2.
Verify page 2 returns distinct IDs with no overlap against page 1 and includes additional AC-13 correction rows.
cases.expected: Paginated audit query honors page and pageSize invariants; totalItems and totalPages reflect only authorized-scope correction events without cross-scope count leakage; manual correction audit rows from AC-13 are queryable across pages with full CMP-01 fields.
